For backdrops like the livestream studio, I'm specifying lighting and environment to enhance the visual outcome. I'm also planning the new XML content.

I'm currently working on making the AI-generated images more realistic. The focus is on ensuring the products are proportionally accurate when paired with human figures. I'm analyzing the original request, paying close attention to the user's specific feedback about realism and proportionality.


**Refining Scale Instructions**

I'm focusing on improving the instructions I give to the model to produce realistic scaling. I've pinpointed the `generateCompositeImage` function within `services/geminiService.ts` as the key area. My current prompt asks the model to "Scale it realistically" which appears too vague. To fix this, I intend to add a specific instruction block in the prompt that emphasizes "Real-World Scale & Physics." I will refine the prompt to instruct the model to analyze the image, taking into account human proportions.


**Assessing Product Dimensions**

I'm now thinking about how to refine the prompt further by considering the product's inherent size. I need to make the prompt more detailed to account for different product types - a bottle versus a fridge, for example. I'm mentally drafting a new prompt that instructs the model to analyze the product and relate its size to familiar objects. This will improve how it resizes relative to the person. This involves examining the `generateCompositeImage` function.


**Enhancing Product Placement**

I'm now revising my prompts to enhance product placement. Specifically, I need the AI to get the product size and model interaction right. I'm focusing on making sure the product is scaled accurately to look real, not giant or cartoonish. I'm going to update the prompts for hand positioning to be more natural. I'm also planning to implement new logic within the `generateMarketingImage` function.


**Improving Hand Interactions**

I'm now zeroing in on hand interactions, aiming to eliminate floating fingers or clipping. I'm focusing on the prompt adjustments needed to ensure physically accurate product-hand connections. I will focus on updating the prompt in the `services/geminiService.ts` file, where the image compositing occurs.


**Optimizing Prompt Instructions**

I'm currently revising the `promptText` within the `generateCompositeImage` function and the `prompt` within the `generateMarketingImage` function. My focus is on achieving the user's requirement for products to be closer to their actual sizes. Trong modul Ghép Ảnh
Cho phép tải ảnh nền tùy chọn lên để AI tự ghép vào bối cảnh tải lên đó

**Envisioning Customization**

I'm now focusing on the user's need for *custom* backgrounds, envisioning how to seamlessly integrate this capability into the "Ghép Ảnh" module. Currently, users are limited to pre-selected images; I'm working to expand options for the user to be able to upload their own images.


**Adding Custom Backdrops**

I'm expanding upon the initial design by integrating a custom background option, allowing users to upload and utilize their own images as backdrops. My focus is on modifying `constants.ts` and `types.ts` to accommodate the new "Custom" option and custom background data, respectively. UI updates in `App.tsx` are also underway, adding an image uploader and managing its state for seamless integration. The `geminiService.ts` function will also be updated to process this custom image as input for the composite generation.


**Incorporating Custom Images**

I'm now zeroing in on integrating custom image logic. I've updated `constants.ts` to include a 'custom_bg' identifier and `types.ts` to hold custom backdrop data. The `App.tsx` file has been updated to handle state, reset functions and pass this custom image to the service. UI updates are in progress, checking for the custom backdrop selection and rendering the image uploader appropriately. I plan to enhance the `geminiService.ts` function to incorporate this user-provided backdrop in the next step.


**Integrating Custom Backgrounds**

I'm presently focused on the logic for the `generateCompositeImage` function.  I'm refining the handling of custom backgrounds by passing the uploaded image as a third input to the model. I've drafted a prompt that explicitly instructs the AI to utilize this third image for the background, adjusting for light.  The model's ability to take multiple inputs allows this enhanced customization. I'm aiming to perfectly blend the subject and product into the provided backdrop.


**Refining Background Integration**

I'm currently focused on the prompt engineering for custom backgrounds, particularly in the `geminiService.ts` function. I've integrated a new prompt specifically for custom backdrops and updated the logic to include this custom image as an additional input to the model. I've also updated `App.tsx` to handle the custom background data and pass this to `geminiService.ts`. I am now working on further refining the lighting and blending instructions within the prompt to ensure seamless integration with the user-provided backdrop.


**Revising UI Components**

I'm now focusing on improving the user interface and data flow to handle custom background uploads. I'm updating `App.tsx` to include an image uploader component specifically for background images. I plan to modify the `handleFileUpload` function to accept a `'bg'` type, streamlining image processing. Changes to `types.ts` and `constants.ts` will support the new background data. I am working on the appropriate state management and data passing to ensure seamless integration.


**Evaluating Implementation Details**

I'm now deep-diving into the final steps. I've re-examined the code, updating the prompt logic to precisely handle three distinct inputs for the AI model. During the `App.tsx` edit, I made a necessary adjustment to the `handleFileUpload` signature to avoid breaking previous functionality. I've also confirmed that the `parts` array order correctly mirrors the prompt's description within `geminiService.ts`, ensuring that the images are processed in the right sequence. The prompt text will now be clarified to accurately specify each image's role: Person, Product, and Custom Background. Now I'll proceed with creating the final XML structure.

Dưới đây là các thay đổi cần thiết để thêm tính năng **Tải Ảnh Nền Tùy Chọn** vào mô-đun Ghép Ảnh.

Tôi sẽ thực hiện các bước sau:
1.  **`types.ts`**: Cập nhật interface `GenerationRequest` để nhận thêm ảnh nền tùy chỉnh.
2.  **`constants.ts`**: Thêm tùy chọn "Tự Tải Ảnh Nền" vào danh sách `BACKDROPS`.
3.  **`App.tsx`**: Thêm state quản lý ảnh nền, thêm ô upload ảnh nền khi người dùng chọn tùy chọn này, và truyền dữ liệu xuống service.
4.  **`services/geminiService.ts`**: Cập nhật logic prompt để AI nhận diện 3 ảnh (Người, Sản phẩm, Nền) và ghép chúng lại với nhau thay vì tự vẽ nền.

  "Mắt to (Big Eyes)",
  "Nâng mũi (Nose Lift)"
];

export const VirtualTryOn: React.FC = () => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'preset' | 'upload'>('preset');
  const [modelImage, setModelImage] = useState<ImageAsset | null>(null);
  
  // Product Upload State
  const [productImage, setProductImage] = useState<ImageAsset | null>(null);

  // Preset State
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState(Object.keys(OUTFIT_STYLES)[0]);
  const [selectedOutfit, setSelectedOutfit] = useState(OUTFIT_STYLES[Object.keys(OUTFIT_STYLES)[0]][0]);
  const [customDescription, setCustomDescription] = useState('');

  // Config State
  const [lighting, setLighting] = useState(LIGHTING_OPTIONS[0]);
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState(FILTER_OPTIONS[0]);
  const [beautyOptions, setBeautyOptions] = useState<string[]>([]);
  
  const [resultImage, setResultImage] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);

  // Mobile scroll ref
  const resultRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // Update selected outfit when category changes
  useMemo(() => {
    if (OUTFIT_STYLES[selectedCategory]) {
      setSelectedOutfit(OUTFIT_STYLES[selectedCategory][0]);
    }
  }, [selectedCategory]);

  // Mobile optimization: Scroll to result when image generated
  useEffect(() => {
    if (resultImage && window.innerWidth < 1024 && resultRef.current) {
        resultRef.current.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    }
  }, [resultImage]);

  const handleModelUpload = async (file: File) => {
    try {
      const base64 = await fileToBase64(file);
      const mimeType = getMimeType(file);
      setModelImage({
        id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
        file,
        previewUrl: URL.createObjectURL(file),
        base64,
        mimeType
      });
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Upload failed", e);
      alert("Lỗi tải ảnh");
    }
  };

  const handleProductUpload = async (file: File) => {
    try {
      const base64 = await fileToBase64(file);
      const mimeType = getMimeType(file);
      setProductImage({
        id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
        file,
        previewUrl: URL.createObjectURL(file),
        base64,
        mimeType
      });
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Upload failed", e);
      alert("Lỗi tải ảnh");
    }
  };

  const toggleBeautyOption = (option: string) => {
    setBeautyOptions(prev => 
      prev.includes(option) ? prev.filter(o => o !== option) : [...prev, option]
    );
  };

  const handleGenerate = async () => {
    if (!modelImage) return;
    
    // Check required inputs based on tab
    if (activeTab === 'upload' && !productImage) {
        alert("Vui lòng tải lên ảnh trang phục mẫu.");
        return;
    }
    
    setIsGenerating(true);
    setResultImage(null);

    try {
      // If activeTab is 'upload', we pass the productImage. 
      // If 'preset', we pass the text description (custom or selected).
      // Logic handled in service: if productImage is present, it uses multi-modal prompt.
      
      const prodImg = activeTab === 'upload' ? productImage : null;
      const desc = activeTab === 'preset' ? (customDescription || selectedOutfit) : "Match the clothing in the reference image";

      const imageUrl = await generateVirtualTryOn(
        modelImage, 
        desc, 
        lighting, 
        filter, 
        beautyOptions,
        prodImg
      );
      setResultImage(imageUrl);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      alert("Không thể thực hiện thay đồ. Vui lòng thử lại.");
    } finally {
      setIsGenerating(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDownload = () => {
    if (resultImage) {
      const link = document.createElement('a');
      link.href = resultImage;
      link.download = `virtual-try-on-${Date.now()}.png`;
      document.body.appendChild(link);
      link.click();
      document.body.removeChild(link);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col animate-fade-in pb-20 lg:pb-0 lg:overflow-hidden overflow-y-auto">
      {/* HEADER */}
      <div className="bg-white p-4 border-b border-gray-200 shrink-0">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
             <div className="p-2 bg-pink-100 rounded-xl text-pink-600">
               <Shirt size={20} />
             </div>
             <div>
               <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-800 text-lg">Phòng Thử Đồ Ảo</h3>
               <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Thay trang phục & Chỉnh sửa ảnh Beauty</p>
             </div>
          </div>
      </div>

      {/* MAIN CONTENT - SPLIT VIEW */}
      <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4 p-3 lg:p-4 lg:overflow-hidden h-auto lg:h-full">
          
          {/* LEFT: INPUT PANEL (SCROLLABLE) */}
          <div className="w-full lg:flex-1 h-auto lg:h-full lg:overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-4 lg:p-6 flex flex-col shrink-0">
              <div className="space-y-6 flex-1">
                {/* 1. Model Upload */}
                <div>
                   <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2 flex items-center">
                      <User size={16} className="mr-2 text-pink-500"/> 1. Ảnh Người Mẫu (Bắt buộc)
                   </label>
                   <UploadBox 
                     id="model-upload" 
                     label="Tải ảnh người muốn thay đồ" 
                     image={modelImage} 
                     onUpload={handleModelUpload} 
                     onRemove={() => setModelImage(null)}
                     heightClass="h-40"
                   />
                </div>

                {/* TAB SELECTION: PRESET VS UPLOAD */}
                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-1 rounded-xl flex">
                    <button
                        onClick={() => setActiveTab('preset')}
                        className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold transition-all ${activeTab === 'preset' ? 'bg-white text-pink-600 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'}`}
                    >
                        Chọn Mẫu Có Sẵn
                    </button>
                    <button
                        onClick={() => setActiveTab('upload')}
                        className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold transition-all ${activeTab === 'upload' ? 'bg-white text-pink-600 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'}`}
                    >
                        Tải Ảnh Đồ Mới
                    </button>
                </div>

                {/* 2. Outfit Selection (CONDITIONAL) */}
                {activeTab === 'preset' ? (
                    <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                        <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2 flex items-center">
                                <Package size={16} className="mr-2 text-pink-500"/> 2. Chọn Trang Phục
                            </label>
                            <select 
                                value={selectedCategory} 
                                onChange={(e) => setSelectedCategory(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full p-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-400 outline-none mb-2 text-sm font-medium"
                            >
                                {Object.keys(OUTFIT_STYLES).map((cat, idx) => (
                                <option key={idx} value={cat}>{cat}</option>
                                ))}
                            </select>
                            <select 
                                value={selectedOutfit} 
                                onChange={(e) => setSelectedOutfit(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full p-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-400 outline-none text-sm"
                            >
                                {OUTFIT_STYLES[selectedCategory].map((item, idx) => (
                                <option key={idx} value={item}>{item}</option>
                                ))}
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2">Hoặc mô tả trang phục mong muốn:</label>
                            <textarea 
                                value={customDescription}
                                onChange={(e) => setCustomDescription(e.target.value)}
                                placeholder="VD: Váy dạ hội màu đỏ, đính đá, hở lưng..."
                                className="w-full p-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-400 outline-none text-sm h-20 resize-none"
                            />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                ) : (
                    <div className="animate-fade-in">
                        <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2 flex items-center">
                            <Upload size={16} className="mr-2 text-pink-500"/> 2. Tải Ảnh Sản Phẩm Mẫu
                        </label>
                        <UploadBox 
                            id="product-upload" 
                            label="Tải ảnh quần áo/váy mẫu" 
                            image={productImage} 
                            onUpload={handleProductUpload} 
                            onRemove={() => setProductImage(null)}
                            heightClass="h-40"
                        />
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2 italic">
                            *AI sẽ tự động mặc trang phục từ ảnh này sang cho người mẫu. Nên dùng ảnh sản phẩm trải phẳng hoặc ảnh manocanh.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                )}

                {/* 3. Advanced Options (Accordion style) */}
                <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-4 space-y-4">
                   <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-700 text-sm">Tùy Chọn Nâng Cao</h4>
                   
                   <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                      <div>
                          <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-1 flex items-center"><Sun size={12} className="mr-1"/> Ánh Sáng</label>
                          <select 
                            value={lighting} 
                            onChange={(e) => setLighting(e.target.value)}
                            className="w-full p-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-xs"
                          >
                             {LIGHTING_OPTIONS.map((l, i) => <option key={i} value={l}>{l}</option>)}
                          </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                          <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-1 flex items-center"><Palette size={12} className="mr-1"/> Bộ Lọc Màu</label>
                          <select 
                            value={filter} 
                            onChange={(e) => setFilter(e.target.value)}
                            className="w-full p-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-xs"
                          >
                             {FILTER_OPTIONS.map((f, i) => <option key={i} value={f}>{f}</option>)}
                          </select>
                      </div>
                   </div>

                   <div>
                       <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-2 flex items-center"><Smile size={12} className="mr-1"/> Chế độ Beauty</label>
                       <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                          {BEAUTY_OPTIONS_LIST.map((opt, idx) => (
                              <label key={idx} className="flex items-center space-x-2 text-xs text-gray-700 cursor-pointer hover:text-pink-600 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg border border-transparent hover:border-pink-200 transition-colors">
                                 <input 
                                   type="checkbox" 
                                   checked={beautyOptions.includes(opt)}
                                   onChange={() => toggleBeautyOption(opt)}
                                   className="rounded text-pink-500 focus:ring-pink-500" 
                                 />
                                 <span>{opt}</span>
                              </label>
                          ))}
                       </div>
                   </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="pt-4 mt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
                  <button
                    onClick={handleGenerate}
                    disabled={!modelImage || isGenerating || (activeTab === 'upload' && !productImage)}
                    className="w-full py-4 bg-pink-600 text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-pink-700 disabled:opacity-50 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-pink-200 flex items-center justify-center group"
                  >
                    {isGenerating ? <Loader2 className="animate-spin" /> : (
                      <>
                        <Wand2 className="mr-2 group-hover:rotate-12 transition-transform" size={20} />
                        Thử Đồ Ngay
                      </>
                    )}
                  </button>
                  <div className="mt-2 p-3 rounded-xl border border-pink-100 bg-pink-50 text-pink-800 text-xs flex items-start gap-2">
                      <Banana size={12} className="mt-0.5 shrink-0"/>
                      <div>
                          <strong>Powered by Google Banana:</strong> Công nghệ xử lý ảnh `gemini-2.5-flash-image` giúp ghép đồ và chỉnh sáng siêu tốc.
                      </div>
                  </div>
              </div>
          </div>

          {/* RIGHT: RESULT PANEL (SCROLLABLE IF NEEDED) */}
          <div ref={resultRef} className="w-full lg:flex-1 h-auto lg:h-full lg:overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden group min-h-[350px] shrink-0">
            {resultImage ? (
               <div className="relative w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-900">
                  <img src={resultImage} alt="Virtual Try-On Result" className="max-w-full max-h-full object-contain shadow-2xl" />
                  <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 flex gap-2">
                     <button 
                       onClick={handleGenerate}
                       className="p-3 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur rounded-full hover:bg-white text-gray-700 shadow-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105"
                       title="Tạo lại"
                     >
                       <RefreshCw size={20} />
                     </button>
                     <button 
                       onClick={handleDownload}
                       className="p-3 bg-pink-600 rounded-full hover:bg-pink-500 text-white shadow-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105"
                       title="Tải ảnh"
                     >
                       <Download size={20} />
                     </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-black/60 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-xs backdrop-blur-md">
                     ✨ Ảnh được tạo bởi AI (Có thể không giống thật 100%)
                  </div>
               </div>
            ) : (
               <div className="text-center text-gray-400 p-6">
                  <div className="w-20 h-20 md:w-24 md:h-24 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 relative">
                     <Shirt size={40} className="text-gray-300" />
                     <div className="absolute -bottom-1 -right-1 bg-pink-100 p-1.5 rounded-full border border-white">
                        <Sparkles size={16} className="text-pink-500" />
                     </div>
                  </div>
                  <p className="font-medium text-lg text-gray-500">Phòng Thử Đồ AI</p>
                  <p className="text-sm mt-1 max-w-xs mx-auto">Tải ảnh người mẫu và chọn trang phục hoặc tải ảnh quần áo mẫu để AI tự động mặc thử.</p>
               </div>
            )}
          </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

**Envisioning Virtual Try-On**

I'm currently focused on dissecting the request. My initial analysis pinpoints the key objective: integrating a "Virtual Try-On" feature, or "Phòng Thử Đồ Ảo," into the existing application. The user-provided content serves as the foundation, and I'm now exploring how to best translate it into an actionable implementation plan.


**Developing the Virtual Component**

I'm now fully immersed in the creation of the `VirtualTryOn.tsx` component. This involves ensuring a smooth flow from the user's initial image upload through to the generation and display of the virtual try-on results. I'm focusing on seamless integration with the `geminiService` and the `UploadBox` component, ensuring the correct data flow, and handling user interactions effectively. The provided code from the user will be the foundation.


**Confirming Dependencies and Flow**

I've been meticulously ensuring that all dependencies are in place. The code checks confirm `UploadBox` is readily available, and `ImageAsset` is appropriately defined within `types.ts`. Now, I'm shifting focus to the `geminiService.ts` to implement the `generateVirtualTryOn` function. This crucial function will handle the core logic, taking a model image and incorporating either a text description or a product image for the "Virtual Try-On". I'm currently working on crafting the prompt engineering instructions for Gemini, defining its role and task, and specifying the input configurations for optimal results, including potential settings for lighting, filters, and beauty enhancements. I'm aiming for concise yet effective instructions for the model.


**Finalizing Component Integration**

I'm presently focused on the integration of the `VirtualTryOn` component into `App.tsx`. The code modifications encompass importing `VirtualTryOn` and incorporating the 'virtual_try_on' option into the `activeTab` state type. Adding a new tab button (Shirt icon) within the header is on the agenda, along with conditional rendering for this new tab. I'm ensuring smooth data flow and interaction between components. I'm also ensuring the types are correctly aligned.


**Optimizing Gemini Prompts**

I've been working on the prompt engineering for Gemini. Based on the user's instructions, I've defined how to instruct the model depending on whether a product image is provided. I am implementing the logic for "Virtual Try-On". If there is an image, the prompt instructs the model to "replace the outfit of the person in Image 1 with the clothing item shown in Image 2." Otherwise it is instructed to use a text description. I am also planning on adding styling instructions for lighting and filters. The current focus is on concisely and effectively framing these instructions to ensure optimal results in the output image. I am now working on the implementation of these prompts.


**Integrating Detailed Implementation**

I'm now integrating the detailed implementations.  The `geminiService.ts` function logic is almost complete and the next step is the `generateVirtualTryOn` function. I am now working on the implementation of these prompts. I'm focusing on ensuring all data types are correctly handled, particularly between `ImageAsset` and `ProcessedImage`.  This includes constructing effective prompts for Gemini, based on text descriptions or product images.  I'm now focused on handling the `App.tsx` additions, making sure it functions seamlessly.


**Completing App Integration**

I'm making progress on finalizing the integration of the `VirtualTryOn` component into `App.tsx`. The recent updates involve importing the necessary `VirtualTryOn` component, extending the `activeTab` state to include 'virtual_try_on', adding a new tab button with the shirt icon, and implementing conditional rendering of the `VirtualTryOn` component. I'm focusing on seamless data flow and correct interaction between these newly added components within the application. The integration will support the virtual try-on feature.


**Finalizing the Base64 handling**

I'm now refining the base64 handling for the Gemini API call within `geminiService.ts`. I need to ensure the raw base64 data without the data prefix is passed to the API. I'm focusing on the conversion from `ImageAsset` to the raw base64 string, so the API receives it in the correct format, as that is what the model expects, now that the underlying code looks solid.


**Refining Data Handling**

I'm currently finalizing the base64 handling within `geminiService.ts` to ensure clean, API-ready data. I'm focusing on stripping the data URL prefix from the base64 string before sending it to Gemini, as the model expects only the raw base64 encoded image data. This is achieved by splitting the base64 string on the comma and taking the second element. I'm making sure that the conversion from the `ImageAsset` interface to the correct format is seamless and now that the underlying logic is solid, the emphasis is on the integration of that.

1.  **`components/VirtualTryOn.tsx`**: Tạo file mới chứa giao diện và logic xử lý thử đồ (như code bạn cung cấp).
2.  **`services/geminiService.ts`**: Thêm hàm `generateVirtualTryOn` để gọi API Gemini xử lý việc thay đổi trang phục.

const LIGHTING_OPTIONS = [
  "Studio Lighting (Ánh sáng phòng chụp)",
  "Golden Hour (Nắng chiều vàng)",
  "Neon Cyberpunk (Đèn Neon tím xanh)",
  "Natural Sunlight (Nắng tự nhiên)",
  "Moonlight (Ánh trăng huyền bí)",
  "Tropical Sun (Nắng biển rực rỡ)",
  "Softbox (Ánh sáng mềm mại)",

  "Candlelight (Ánh nến lãng mạn)",
  "Disco Lights (Đèn sân khấu)"

const FILTER_OPTIONS = [
  "None (Màu gốc)",
  "Vivid (Rực rỡ)",
  "Vintage (Cổ điển)",
  "Black & White (Trắng đen nghệ thuật)",
  "Pastel (Màu phấn dịu nhẹ)",
  "Cinematic (Màu điện ảnh)",
  "Warm Tone (Tông ấm)",
  "Cool Tone (Tông lạnh)",
  "Matte (Màu lì)",
  "HDR (Chi tiết cao)"

const BEAUTY_OPTIONS_LIST = [
  "Làm mịn da (Smooth Skin)",
  "Thon gọn mặt (Slim Face)",
  "Trắng da (Whitening)",
  "Trang điểm tự nhiên (Natural Makeup)",
  "Mắt to (Big Eyes)",
  "Nâng mũi (Nose Lift)"
];

export const VirtualTryOn: React.FC = () => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'preset' | 'upload'>('preset');
  const [modelImage, setModelImage] = useState<ImageAsset | null>(null);
  
  // Product Upload State
  const [productImage, setProductImage] = useState<ImageAsset | null>(null);

  // Preset State
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState(Object.keys(OUTFIT_STYLES)[0]);
  const [selectedOutfit, setSelectedOutfit] = useState(OUTFIT_STYLES[Object.keys(OUTFIT_STYLES)[0]][0]);
  const [customDescription, setCustomDescription] = useState('');

  // Config State
  const [lighting, setLighting] = useState(LIGHTING_OPTIONS[0]);
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState(FILTER_OPTIONS[0]);
  const [beautyOptions, setBeautyOptions] = useState<string[]>([]);
  
  const [resultImage, setResultImage] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);

  // Mobile scroll ref
  const resultRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // Update selected outfit when category changes
  useMemo(() => {
    if (OUTFIT_STYLES[selectedCategory]) {
      setSelectedOutfit(OUTFIT_STYLES[selectedCategory][0]);
    }
  }, [selectedCategory]);

  // Mobile optimization: Scroll to result when image generated
  useEffect(() => {
    if (resultImage && window.innerWidth < 1024 && resultRef.current) {
        resultRef.current.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    }
  }, [resultImage]);

  const handleModelUpload = async (file: File) => {
    try {
      const base64 = await fileToBase64(file);
      const mimeType = getMimeType(file);
      setModelImage({
        id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
        file,
        previewUrl: URL.createObjectURL(file),
        base64,
        mimeType
      });
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Upload failed", e);
      alert("Lỗi tải ảnh");
    }
  };

  const handleProductUpload = async (file: File) => {
    try {
      const base64 = await fileToBase64(file);
      const mimeType = getMimeType(file);
      setProductImage({
        id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
        file,
        previewUrl: URL.createObjectURL(file),
        base64,
        mimeType
      });
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Upload failed", e);
      alert("Lỗi tải ảnh");
    }
  };

  const toggleBeautyOption = (option: string) => {
    setBeautyOptions(prev => 
      prev.includes(option) ? prev.filter(o => o !== option) : [...prev, option]
    );
  };

  const handleGenerate = async () => {
    if (!modelImage) return;
    
    // Check required inputs based on tab
    if (activeTab === 'upload' && !productImage) {
        alert("Vui lòng tải lên ảnh trang phục mẫu.");
        return;
    }
    
    setIsGenerating(true);
    setResultImage(null);

    try {
      // If activeTab is 'upload', we pass the productImage. 
      // If 'preset', we pass the text description (custom or selected).
      // Logic handled in service: if productImage is present, it uses multi-modal prompt.
      
      const prodImg = activeTab === 'upload' ? productImage : null;
      const desc = activeTab === 'preset' ? (customDescription || selectedOutfit) : "Match the clothing in the reference image";

      const imageUrl = await generateVirtualTryOn(
        modelImage, 
        desc, 
        lighting, 
        filter, 
        beautyOptions,
        prodImg
      );
      setResultImage(imageUrl);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      alert("Không thể thực hiện thay đồ. Vui lòng thử lại.");
    } finally {
      setIsGenerating(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDownload = () => {
    if (resultImage) {
      const link = document.createElement('a');
      link.href = resultImage;
      link.download = `virtual-try-on-${Date.now()}.png`;
      document.body.appendChild(link);
      link.click();
      document.body.removeChild(link);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col animate-fade-in pb-20 lg:pb-0 lg:overflow-hidden overflow-y-auto">
      {/* HEADER */}
      <div className="bg-white p-4 border-b border-gray-200 shrink-0">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
             <div className="p-2 bg-pink-100 rounded-xl text-pink-600">
               <Shirt size={20} />
             </div>
             <div>
               <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-800 text-lg">Phòng Thử Đồ Ảo</h3>
               <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Thay trang phục & Chỉnh sửa ảnh Beauty</p>
             </div>
          </div>
      </div>

      {/* MAIN CONTENT - SPLIT VIEW */}
      <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4 p-3 lg:p-4 lg:overflow-hidden h-auto lg:h-full">
          
          {/* LEFT: INPUT PANEL (SCROLLABLE) */}
          <div className="w-full lg:flex-1 h-auto lg:h-full lg:overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-4 lg:p-6 flex flex-col shrink-0">
              <div className="space-y-6 flex-1">
                {/* 1. Model Upload */}
                <div>
                   <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2 flex items-center">
                      <User size={16} className="mr-2 text-pink-500"/> 1. Ảnh Người Mẫu (Bắt buộc)
                   </label>
                   <UploadBox 
                     id="model-upload" 
                     label="Tải ảnh người muốn thay đồ" 
                     image={modelImage} 
                     onUpload={handleModelUpload} 
                     onRemove={() => setModelImage(null)}
                     heightClass="h-40"
                   />
                </div>

                {/* TAB SELECTION: PRESET VS UPLOAD */}
                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-1 rounded-xl flex">
                    <button
                        onClick={() => setActiveTab('preset')}
                        className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold transition-all ${activeTab === 'preset' ? 'bg-white text-pink-600 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'}`}
                    >
                        Chọn Mẫu Có Sẵn
                    </button>
                    <button
                        onClick={() => setActiveTab('upload')}
                        className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold transition-all ${activeTab === 'upload' ? 'bg-white text-pink-600 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'}`}
                    >
                        Tải Ảnh Đồ Mới
                    </button>
                </div>

                {/* 2. Outfit Selection (CONDITIONAL) */}
                {activeTab === 'preset' ? (
                    <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                        <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2 flex items-center">
                                <Package size={16} className="mr-2 text-pink-500"/> 2. Chọn Trang Phục
                            </label>
                            <select 
                                value={selectedCategory} 
                                onChange={(e) => setSelectedCategory(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full p-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-400 outline-none mb-2 text-sm font-medium"
                            >
                                {Object.keys(OUTFIT_STYLES).map((cat, idx) => (
                                <option key={idx} value={cat}>{cat}</option>
                                ))}
                            </select>
                            <select 
                                value={selectedOutfit} 
                                onChange={(e) => setSelectedOutfit(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full p-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-400 outline-none text-sm"
                            >
                                {OUTFIT_STYLES[selectedCategory].map((item, idx) => (
                                <option key={idx} value={item}>{item}</option>
                                ))}
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2">Hoặc mô tả trang phục mong muốn:</label>
                            <textarea 
                                value={customDescription}
                                onChange={(e) => setCustomDescription(e.target.value)}
                                placeholder="VD: Váy dạ hội màu đỏ, đính đá, hở lưng..."
                                className="w-full p-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-400 outline-none text-sm h-20 resize-none"
                            />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                ) : (
                    <div className="animate-fade-in">
                        <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2 flex items-center">
                            <Upload size={16} className="mr-2 text-pink-500"/> 2. Tải Ảnh Sản Phẩm Mẫu
                        </label>
                        <UploadBox 
                            id="product-upload" 
                            label="Tải ảnh quần áo/váy mẫu" 
                            image={productImage} 
                            onUpload={handleProductUpload} 
                            onRemove={() => setProductImage(null)}
                            heightClass="h-40"
                        />
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2 italic">
                            *AI sẽ tự động mặc trang phục từ ảnh này sang cho người mẫu. Nên dùng ảnh sản phẩm trải phẳng hoặc ảnh manocanh.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                )}

                {/* 3. Advanced Options (Accordion style) */}
                <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-4 space-y-4">
                   <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-700 text-sm">Tùy Chọn Nâng Cao</h4>
                   
                   <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                      <div>
                          <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-1 flex items-center"><Sun size={12} className="mr-1"/> Ánh Sáng</label>
                          <select 
                            value={lighting} 
                            onChange={(e) => setLighting(e.target.value)}
                            className="w-full p-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-xs"
                          >
                             {LIGHTING_OPTIONS.map((l, i) => <option key={i} value={l}>{l}</option>)}
                          </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                          <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-1 flex items-center"><Palette size={12} className="mr-1"/> Bộ Lọc Màu</label>
                          <select 
                            value={filter} 
                            onChange={(e) => setFilter(e.target.value)}
                            className="w-full p-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-xs"
                          >
                             {FILTER_OPTIONS.map((f, i) => <option key={i} value={f}>{f}</option>)}
                          </select>
                      </div>
                   </div>

                   <div>
                       <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-2 flex items-center"><Smile size={12} className="mr-1"/> Chế độ Beauty</label>
                       <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                          {BEAUTY_OPTIONS_LIST.map((opt, idx) => (
                              <label key={idx} className="flex items-center space-x-2 text-xs text-gray-700 cursor-pointer hover:text-pink-600 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg border border-transparent hover:border-pink-200 transition-colors">
                                 <input 
                                   type="checkbox" 
                                   checked={beautyOptions.includes(opt)}
                                   onChange={() => toggleBeautyOption(opt)}
                                   className="rounded text-pink-500 focus:ring-pink-500" 
                                 />
                                 <span>{opt}</span>
                              </label>
                          ))}
                       </div>
                   </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="pt-4 mt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
                  <button
                    onClick={handleGenerate}
                    disabled={!modelImage || isGenerating || (activeTab === 'upload' && !productImage)}
                    className="w-full py-4 bg-pink-600 text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-pink-700 disabled:opacity-50 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-pink-200 flex items-center justify-center group"
                  >
                    {isGenerating ? <Loader2 className="animate-spin" /> : (
                      <>
                        <Wand2 className="mr-2 group-hover:rotate-12 transition-transform" size={20} />
                        Thử Đồ Ngay
                      </>
                    )}
                  </button>
                  <div className="mt-2 p-3 rounded-xl border border-pink-100 bg-pink-50 text-pink-800 text-xs flex items-start gap-2">
                      <Banana size={12} className="mt-0.5 shrink-0"/>
                      <div>
                          <strong>Powered by Google Banana:</strong> Công nghệ xử lý ảnh `gemini-2.5-flash-image` giúp ghép đồ và chỉnh sáng siêu tốc.
                      </div>
                  </div>
              </div>
          </div>

          {/* RIGHT: RESULT PANEL (SCROLLABLE IF NEEDED) */}
          <div ref={resultRef} className="w-full lg:flex-1 h-auto lg:h-full lg:overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden group min-h-[350px] shrink-0">
            {resultImage ? (
               <div className="relative w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-900">
                  <img src={resultImage} alt="Virtual Try-On Result" className="max-w-full max-h-full object-contain shadow-2xl" />
                  <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 flex gap-2">
                     <button 
                       onClick={handleGenerate}
                       className="p-3 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur rounded-full hover:bg-white text-gray-700 shadow-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105"
                       title="Tạo lại"
                     >
                       <RefreshCw size={20} />
                     </button>
                     <button 
                       onClick={handleDownload}
                       className="p-3 bg-pink-600 rounded-full hover:bg-pink-500 text-white shadow-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105"
                       title="Tải ảnh"
                     >
                       <Download size={20} />
                     </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-black/60 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-xs backdrop-blur-md">
                     ✨ Ảnh được tạo bởi AI (Có thể không giống thật 100%)
                  </div>
               </div>
            ) : (
               <div className="text-center text-gray-400 p-6">
                  <div className="w-20 h-20 md:w-24 md:h-24 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 relative">
                     <Shirt size={40} className="text-gray-300" />
                     <div className="absolute -bottom-1 -right-1 bg-pink-100 p-1.5 rounded-full border border-white">
                        <Sparkles size={16} className="text-pink-500" />
                     </div>
                  </div>
                  <p className="font-medium text-lg text-gray-500">Phòng Thử Đồ AI</p>
                  <p className="text-sm mt-1 max-w-xs mx-auto">Tải ảnh người mẫu và chọn trang phục hoặc tải ảnh quần áo mẫu để AI tự động mặc thử.</p>
               </div>
            )}
          </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

Thêm tab 'Thử Đồ Ảo' vào thanh điều hướng và render component VirtualTryOn
